skills.name: Napalm Bullet
skills.description: Create an explosion to inflict Fire damage on enemies in front of you.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 4
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Double Gun Stance
skills.description: Put the sub-weapon in and change to a double pistol stance. Bullet Marker available and basic attack changes.
skills.effect_text:
Basic Attack Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Basic attack changed

skills.name: R.I.P.
skills.description: Attack enemies in front of you using a series of attacks with a pistol in both hands.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 8
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
Can be used after activating Double Gun Stance

skills.name: Bloody Overdrive
skills.description: Attack enemies around you by firing pistols in both hands. Your character cannot be knocked back or knocked down while the skill is in use.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 20
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
Can be used after activating Double Gun Stance

attributes.name: Markmanship: Additional Damage
attributes.description: * Additional damage increases by [Physical ATK x 10% per attribute level]

attributes.name: Napalm Bullet: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Napalm Bullet] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: R.I.P.: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [R.I.P.] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Bloody Overdrive: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Bloody Overdrive] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Mozambique Drill: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Mozambique Drill] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Bloody Overdrive: Ricochet
attributes.description:
* Enemies hit by [Bloody Overdrive] have a 5% chance per attribute level of being affected by ricochet

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Mozambique Drill: Ignore Defense
attributes.description:
* Ignores enemy defense by 2% per attribute level when using [Mozambique Drill]

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Mozambique Drill: Ricochet
attributes.description:
* Creates a ricochet effect on enemies attacked with [Mozambique Drill]

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Bloody Overdrive: Invincible
attributes.description:
* Grants invincibility for 1 second while [Bloody Overdrive] is actived

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: [Arts] Freeze Bullet: Fog
attributes.description:
* [Freeze Bullet] creates a fog during the buff that chills and eventually freezes enemies.

* Enemies within the fog continuosly gain stacks of the [Chill] debuff.

* Enemies under the [Chill] debuff are slowed, and will be [Frozen] for 2 seconds upon reaching 4 stacks.

attributes.name: [Arts] Napalm Bullet: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Napalm Bullet] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] R.I.P.: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [R.I.P.] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Bloody Overdrive: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Bloody Overdrive] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Mozambique Drill: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Mozambique Drill] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Freeze Bullet: Silver Pellet
attributes.description: * Freezes the enemy but additional Holy property attack is given by 30% of chance when attacking with a basic attack (15% chance in PvP)

attributes.name: [Arts] Bloody Overdrive: Broadside
attributes.description:
* Attacks the enemy 4 times faster than the original

* [Bloody Overdrive: Invincible] attribute does not apply

* 0.5 seconds of delay after casting in PVP zone

attributes.name: Double Gun Stance: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Double Gun Stance] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level
